user.title: Sonos Hue Sync
user.description: Configure the Sonos speaker and Hue lights/groups.

data_description.sonos_entity: Choose the Sonos media player to follow. For grouped speakers, choose the room that shows active playback metadata.
data_description.light_entities: Choose one or more Home Assistant light entities. You can select individual bulbs, Hue rooms, zones, or groups.
data_description.color_count: Number of colors to extract from album art. If there are more lights than colors, colors repeat.
data_description.transition: Fade time in seconds when applying new colors.
data_description.filter_dull: Remove black, gray, muddy, or very dark colors while keeping bright whites and cream tones.
data_description.cache: Reuse colors for album art that has already been processed.
data_description.expand_groups: When a selected light is a room, zone, or group, distribute colors across its member lights instead of applying one color to the whole group.
data_description.assignment_strategy: Controls how colors are assigned to lights. Balanced spreads distinct colors, Sequential follows palette order, Alternating mixes bright and dim tones, and Brightness order sorts colors from bright to dark.
data_description.group_entities: Optional. Choose real Hue room/zone/group light entities to expand into their member lights. Use this when Home Assistant exposes helper entities such as Primary or Ambient that do not list members.

init.title: Sonos Hue Sync options
init.description: Update the speaker, Hue targets, and palette behavior.
